_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Design, develop, and modify network systems, using scientific analysis and mathematical models to predict and measure outcome and consequences of design.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP, DNS resolution, HTTP/HTTPS protocols, firewall and security group configurations, load balancing, and how network architecture affects data pipeline design and performance.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-004 (LS, cosine: 0.422), DG-K-007 (DG, cosine: 0.419).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.512). Shared vocabulary: [design, network, systems]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, consequences, develop, mathematical, measure, models] vs WIDAI-only terms [affects, architecture, balancing, configurations, data, dns] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.854 (P=0.867, R=0.841). P exceeds R by 0.026 — the DCWF element's 21 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 31 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Design, develop, and modify network systems, using scientific analysis and mathe" and "Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.448 < STS 0.512 (gap -0.064). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [analysis, consequences, develop] and [affects, architecture, balancing] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.6%. Shared tokens: [design, network, systems]. DCWF-only: [analysis, consequences, develop, mathematical, measure, models]. WIDAI-only: [affects, architecture, balancing, configurations, data, dns].
